instruction: Wrap the hackathon email thread in the inbox first. Then review the Sydney board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send bob@example.com a short update.
canonical_instruction: The hackathon email thread in the inbox needs attention today. Then check the Sydney board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send bob@example.com a quick update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/sydney-hackathon-followup.txt' --content 'Sydney hackathon follow-up handoff note.'
email send --to bob@example.com --subject 'Hackathon follow-up for Sydney' --body 'Tracking the next step for Sydney.'
